summary: Complete V2 end-to-end testing of LMB Illustrations app. All 21 backend tests pass (15 new V2 + 6 V1 regression). Full frontend flow verified: OCR → article generation (FAL.ai) → Recap → Export ZIP. All real API integrations working: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini OCR, GPT auto-selection, FAL.ai fal-ai/flux-2/edit for pictos and illustrations.

issues: Images from FAL.ai CDN appear blank at screenshot time due to async loading delay — not a real bug, images load correctly in real browser use

critical_code_review_comments: All code is clean and well-structured. No critical issues found.
server.py respects MongoDB _id exclusion via projection {_id: 0} throughout.
FAL.ai URL used in generate/picto and generate/illustration uses fal-ai/flux-2/edit correctly with reference image_urls.
Export ZIP correctly downloads 3 files (2 pictos + 1 illustration) from FAL.ai CDN.
OCR uses PIL to resize image before sending to OpenAI — good optimization.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows: OCR, generation, stepper, Changer, Recap, Export ZIP)

test_credentials: OPENAI_API_KEY and FAL_KEY in backend/.env — real API calls made
seed_data_creation: Created test sessions via API (cleaned up by test fixtures). Several sessions from frontend testing remain in DB (3 'Session LMB — 15/03/2026' sessions visible in /sessions list). One 'TEST_V2_Session' session was auto-cleaned by pytest fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 full workflow tested and working: StepImport (OCR auto-start) → StepArticle (4-step generation with FAL.ai: propositions pictos, génération pictos x2, propositions illus, génération illus) → SessionRecap (grid + export ZIP). All endpoints tested with real API calls. Reference images (picto3/5/6.png and illus1/2/3.png) are accessible at /api/static/references/. The 'Changer' button on each picto/illustration opens a proposition panel. Playwright note: file input has class='hidden' so use query_selector (not wait_for_selector with visibility) then set_input_files directly.
rca_of_issues: No issues found. All V2 endpoints functional. FAL.ai fal-ai/flux-2/edit with image_urls reference parameter working as expected with style transfer.
